name: Hauberk of the Crimson Gale

dbEquipBonuses.name: Lethal Focus
dbEquipBonuses.description: When you damage your target for more than 15% of your Maximum Hit Points in a single blow, you gain +3% Hit Points and +4% Accuracy for 7 seconds (5 second cooldown).
